Web search results confirm 'Harold J. Spaeth' as the full name of the primary database creator

privileged_info_summary: The Supreme Court Database is a real dataset created by Harold J. Spaeth at Washington University in St. Louis. The database contains metadata about Supreme Court cases and is available at scdb.wustl.edu (original) and scdb.la.psu.edu (current Penn State hosting as of 2024). The 2023 release (SCDB_2023_01) was published in December 2023 and includes data on Supreme Court cases with over 200 metadata fields per case. The database is available in multiple data file formats including CSV, Excel, SPSS, SAS, and Stata.
